name: ARCTIC COOLING Liquid Freezer III - 240 A-RGB (White): All-in-One CPU Water Cooler with 240mm radiator and 2x P12 PWM PST A-RGB fan, compatible Intel LGA1700, 1851 and AMD AM4, AM5 - White color
